overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm. The camera follows a pedestrian with a purple umbrella across a street, then continues along an elevated highway ramp with passing vehicles, surrounded by towering buildings with digital billboards and complex highway infrastructure.

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet street while following an NPC with a distinctive purple umbrella. The scene transitions from the sidewalk to the open intersection, then turns onto an elevated highway ramp as the urban landscape opens up.

segments.scene_description: Traveling along a rain-slicked elevated highway ramp with complex interchanges and overpasses overhead. Vehicles periodically pass by while the camera moves through the foggy futuristic cityscape, with distant skyscrapers barely visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk downtown that gradually ascends into a complex network of elevated highways. It begins along a foggy sidewalk lined with palm trees, where towering buildings and bright digital billboards loom through the haze. As the camera reaches an intersection, it follows a pedestrian with a purple umbrella across the wet street, transitioning from the pedestrian path to the open road. The scene then shifts upward onto a rain-slicked highway ramp, moving beneath a canopy of intricate interchanges and overpasses. Finally, the camera glides past passing vehicles through the dense fog, with distant skyscrapers barely visible against the futuristic cityscape.
